_note: Federal races for Texas 2026, auto-generated from OpenFEC on 2026-06-04 (Task #96). candidate_ids point into candidates.json. Only federal races (US Senate / US House) are present — the FEC has no state or local candidates (those remain Tasks #98 / #99).
_source: OpenFEC /candidates/totals/ active committees. Replace/augment with the state Secretary of State certified ballot + Ballotpedia when funded.

races.general_candidates_note: Candidates listed are those with active FEC committees for the 2026 cycle, grouped by party. The general-election ballot must be verified against the state's certified candidate list; FEC committee status does not equal ballot qualification.
races.notes: Auto-generated from OpenFEC on 2026-06-04. Skeleton records for non-incumbents (FEC-sourced facts only); incumbents enriched from neutral congress_profiles.json. Verify against the state Secretary of State before treating as a certified ballot.
